TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Norway, title = Norway, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Norway} }

S.FORM: Norway u Norway sa i labu nu Europe (O-Cuo ś≠źśī≤), itiza i 62 00 N, 10 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 323,802 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 304,282 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 19,520 km2. hamin nu tademawan sa 5,594,34 (2025). kakalukan umah sa 2.70%, kilakilangan umah sa 27.80%, zumaay henay umah sa 69.50%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Oslo . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 17 bulad 5 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (cong-tung, ÁłĹÁĶĪ) ayza sa ci Harald V, micakat a demiad sa i 1991 a mihca 1 bulad 17 demiad. cunli u cunli nu Norway ayza sa ci Jonas Gahr St√łre (Ap) (2021‚Äď), micakat a demiad sa i 2021 a mihcaan 10 bulad 14 demiad. likisi atu lalangawan nu Norway namakayda i amis nu Ze-Er-Man a tademaw kunyun pitu a lasubu siwa a bataan (790) a mihecaan malingatu misaahebal, katukuh i cacay a malebut enem a bataan idaw ku enem (1066) a mihecaan Denmark (Dan-May šłĻťļ•) a tademaw nu iluc madebung nuheni ku Ing-Ke-Lan , pangangan han tu "Wey-Cin-se-day" , u O-Cuo nanu mukasiay a zida' katukuh i nutebanay a se-ci nu milakuuytay a zitay. . Vikings (Wey-Cin a tademaw Á∂≠šļ¨šļļ) sasi nganganay a pacunaay tu balunga a tademaw, itda kuhuheni i De-Lan luyaluy a subal , Fa-Luo luyaluy a subal , Iceland (Pin-Daw ŚÜįŚ≥∂), Greenland (Ke-Lin-Lan ś†ľťôĶŤė≠), patideng kunuheni tu kakitidaan, itini i pulu' a bataan nu nikudan a secian cacay henay kasiwantan kueneng i Mey-Cuo Niw-Fen-Lan a siluma' sa. . unuheni han u micebisay nu kukung, palecad han kunipisiwbay, patideng kunuheni tu luma i Europe (O-Cuo ś≠źśī≤) nu lilis a dadipasan atu tepal nu sauwacan. idaw kuni pikilukan sakamusa i kunyun walu a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku siwa (839) a mihcaan namidebung henay ku nuheni tu Byzantinum hungtiay a kanatal (Pay-Can-Tin-Di'-Kuo śčúŚć†ŚĽ∑ŚłĚŚúč) micaliw tu hiday mamisawacu Africa . . nuheni a tademaw laklak sa i Europe (O-Cuo ś≠źśī≤), maala tu England a Denmark nu niyadu', Gi-Fu-Luo-Se , France a Nuo-Man-Di . katukuh tu Wey-Cin-Se-Day a hedek, Pey-O culal sa masacacay micidek patideng tu kanatal atu kuo-wan , milayap kunuheni tu kelistukiw , malingatu satu tu teban a se-ci . . katukuh tu Europe (O-Cuo ś≠źśī≤) namakay cuwacuwaay nu kanatal nika icelangan, tanengtu malalebu' tu ibayuay a lumuwataw Viking (Wey-Cin Á∂≠šļ¨) sa, Viking (Wey-Cin Á∂≠šļ¨) hamaw satu a malawpes. ÁīĄ820 . kiya walu a lasubu tusa a bataan (820) a mihcaan i nu Norway adidiay a kanatal nu liklik. sakaetiman nu wankuo u Si-Fu-Er , Huo-La-Cia-Lan , A-Er-Feo-Hay-Mu atu A-Ke-De-E , Ka-Er-Ma-Lian (Ść°Áąĺť¶¨ŤĀĮ, Kalmarunionen,cacay a malebut tulu a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku pitu ~ cacay a malebut lima a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku tulu (1397-1523) u sabaw tu sepat (14) a seci nu nikudan katukuh sabaw tu enem (16) a seci nu lingatu namaka Denmark , Sweden atu Norway misakaputay nu Se-Kan a Na-Wey-Ya kanatalay a lanmun . cacay a malebut tulu a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku pitu (1397) a mihcaan enem a bulad sabaw tu pitu a demiad, Denmark , Sweden atu Norway dayhuw itini i Sweden timulan a tukay Ka-Er-Ma mikaygi, pakasimata ku nuheni tu tuluay a wankuo mapulung kunuheni palekal tu Denmark nI-wang ci Ma-Ke-Li-Te' ise u kuo-wan atu secen a tademaw, u Norway atu Sweden kuowan u Denmark kuowan ku sikawaway . . Denmark wan-se mala nu tatuluay a kanatal mikuwanay.taya nu Sweden atu Norway hidantu ku wankuo caay bulici nuheni ku ngangan. . Denmark wanse pulungen nuheni ku tuluay a sakayputah a cabay atu nu hitay a kakawaw , sisa Sweden atu Norway hidantu ku wankuo caay bulici nuheni ku ngangan. . Denmark wanse pulungen nuheni ku tuluay a sakayputah a cabay atu nu hitay a kakawaw , nu kanatal tu akawaw u kanatal tu kumicidekay amasacacay. šĹÜśėĮ, . nika , inika pulunga tawya, Denmark kuowan caay kawni pikawaw tu Sweden secen atu kuowan, nu Sweden kuo-wan sakawaluay a Ka-Er mikuwan henay sa. . itini i salaadan sa, Sweden nu tateneng mikuwan sa numaka i nuudip tu a kanatal nu siilaya ani singkiwan nu secen tatapang śĒĚśĒŅŚģė. . tuluay a lanman hamin han ku Europe a kakitidaan pulung han tu cacay a wankuo amikuwan, pangalep tu Pa-o a niyaduan palung hantu cacaya a kuowan amikuwan, paka siida tu Pa-o a kanatal paculi tu De-I'-Ce-Han-Sa tungmum itida i Po-Luo-Di' a bayu atu amis a bayu anipisiwbaya putuna ku sakatayni. sabaw tu lima (15) a seci mahedek, Denmark wanse atu Sweden siidaay nai ku watan nikasasukapah, mihantaya a lanman sawsawni masasu ada kunuheni . . Ke-Li-S-Di-An e'se, i cacay a malebut lima a lasubu tusa a bataan (1520) a mihcaan ladayen nida ku hitay mialaw tu Sweden mihantaya nu mikuwanay a Sweden suodu S-De-Ke-E-Muo , sisa pipatayen nuheni ku katuuday nu palekalay tu kawaw a Sweden nusi idaay. 16 . sabaw tu enem a (16) a seci nu aayaw a Ka-Ma-Lenmum mililitay a tademaw cacay a malebut tulu a lasubu walu a bataan (1380) a mihcaan ci Ma-Ke-Li-Te' ise pabelien nida ku teluc, Po-Ma-La-Ni-Ia a pala Ay-Li-Ke'-Zn Norway kiowan. . u Norway han naw Di-Ke-Lin-Lan subal , Iceland atu Fa-luo luyaluy a subal namakayni malingatu u Denmark kumi kuwanay. . pulung nu lanmun sayaway, Ma-ke-li-te' ese a dawmi' nu wayway u Denmark wanse madiput nu pinaay a kanatal nu namuh, sisa nikudan satu Denmark wanse caay tu pisengal mikuwan tu Norway atu Sweden a labuay nu kawaw, nikahida sisa lanman miliyas tu nuhenian. 14Ťá≥16šłĖÁīÄ, . sabaw tu sepat (14) katukuh sabaw tu enem (16) a seci , Denmark maydih misungay tu Han-Sa' Tung-Mung milihida tu Puo-Luo-Di' a bayu a mikawaw pa'pun malihida malepacaw. . Denmark Aw-ten-paw wancaw a Ke'-Li-S-Di'-An ese'maala nida ku De-I-Ce a kitidaan Se-Le-Su-I-Ke atu He-E-Se-Tay-In a sapikuwan. 1521 . cacay a malebut lima a bataan tusa a lasubu idaw ku cacay (1521) a mihcaan Sweden siidaay ci Ku-S-Ta-Hu .Wa-Sa' itida i Da-La-Na-Sen milingatu palekal tu baluhay a Denmark nu hidayan. 1523ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut lima a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku tulu (1523) a mihcaan ci Ku-Se-Ta-Hu .Wa-Sa' itida i Han-Sa- Tunmum nipadangan sa midebung tu Se-De-Ke-E-Muo , Denmark ahitayan mademec, Sweden mapalekal misatada'. . mapatideng satu ku Sweden , Ka-E-Ma-Lanmum mabulesak tu kunuheni, nika u Denmark atu Norway mahidatu kunuheni masasukapah a kanatal. cacay a malebut lima a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku sepat (1534) a mihcaan Norway mapalawpes ku wankuo a ngangan, pahetiken mala Denmark a kenis. 17 . sabaw tu pitu (17) a seci, Sweden mangalay mialaw tu Po-Luo-Di' a bayu caay pisengal atu Denmark malepacaw. cacay a malebut enem a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku walu (1658) a mihcaan, Sweden sadikuday satu maalaw tu nuheni ku S-Kan-De-Na-Wia-ya a kumay s nu hatidaay tu nutenes ani a lawan nu Denmark a nutimulan nu dadipasan a kakitidaan. 1809ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut walu a lasubu idaw ku siwa (1809) a mihcaan, E'-Russia dikuo debungan nu Sweden mikuwan tu Finland . Na-Puo-Lun nikaminan satu malepacaw , sakamusa cacay a malebut walu a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku sepat (1814) a mihcaan nu Ci-E nika sasulitan nika sasulitan, Denmark hiyan nu Norway sipabeli i Sweden . apuyu kuni kalpacaw amiwaies, Norway mala Sweden kuowan nikuwanan a wankuo. 1905ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu idaw ku lima (1905) a mihcaan, Norway han misadawmin tu wayway namaka Sweden micidek masacacay. 1938ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku walu (1938) a mihcaan , Iceland miales tu Denmark micidek masacacay. Fa-Luo luyaluy a subal atu Greenland katukuh ayda u Denmark a lala'.

d…ônmark kumi kuwanaj. . pur~…ĺuŇč nu r~…ĺanmun sajawaj, ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° …ôs…ô a dawmi Ē~ ° nu wajwaj u d…ônmark wans…ô madiput nu pinaaj a kanatar~…ĺ nu namuńß, sisa nikudan satu d…ônmark wans…ô ¶aaj tu pis…ôŇčar~…ĺ mikuwan tu norwaj atu sw…ôd…ôn a r~…ĺabuaj nu kawaw, nikańßida sisa r~…ĺanman mir~…ĺijas tu nuńß…ônian. *******, . sabaw tu s…ôpat (**) katukuńß sabaw tu …ôn…ôm (**) a s…ô ¶i , d…ônmark majdińß misuŇčaj tu ńßan-sa Ē~ ° tuŇč-muŇč mir~…ĺińßida tu puo-r~…ĺuo-di Ē~ ° a baju a mikawaw pa Ē~ °pun mar~…ĺińßida mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw. . d…ônmark aw-t…ôn-paw wan ¶aw a k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-s-di Ē~ °-an …ôs…ô Ē~ °maar~…ĺa nida ku d…ô-i- ¶…ô a kitidaan s…ô-r~…ĺ…ô-su-i-k…ô atu ńß…ô-…ô-s…ô-taj-in a sapikuwan. **** . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a bataan tusa a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku ¶a ¶aj (****) a mińß ¶aan sw…ôd…ôn siidaaj ¶i ku-s-ta-ńßu .wa-sa Ē~ ° itida i da-r~…ĺa-na-s…ôn mir~…ĺiŇčatu par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a d…ônmark nu ńßidajan. *****, . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu (****) a mińß ¶aan ¶i ku-s…ô-ta-ńßu .wa-sa Ē~ ° itida i ńßan-sa- tunmum nipadaŇčan sa mid…ôbuŇč tu s…ô-d…ô-k…ô-…ô-muo , d…ônmark ańßitajan mad…ôm…ô ¶, sw…ôd…ôn mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ misatada Ē~ °. . mapatid…ôŇč satu ku sw…ôd…ôn , ka-…ô-ma-r~…ĺanmum mabur~…ĺ…ôsak tu kunuńß…ôni, nika u d…ônmark atu norwaj mańßidatu kunuńß…ôni masasukapańß a kanatar~…ĺ. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat (****) a mińß ¶aan norwaj mapar~…ĺawp…ôs ku wankuo a ŇčaŇčan, pańß…ôtik…ôn mar~…ĺa d…ônmark a k…ônis. ** . sabaw tu pitu (**) a s…ô ¶i, sw…ôd…ôn maŇčar~…ĺaj miar~…ĺaw tu po-r~…ĺuo-di Ē~ ° a baju ¶aaj pis…ôŇčar~…ĺ atu d…ônmark mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut …ôn…ôm a r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku war~…ĺu (****) a mińß ¶aan, sw…ôd…ôn sadikudaj satu maar~…ĺaw tu nuńß…ôni ku s-kan-d…ô-na-wia-ja a kumaj s nu ńßatidaaj tu nut…ôn…ôs ani a r~…ĺawan nu d…ônmark a nutimur~…ĺan nu dadipasan a kakitidaan. *****, . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku siwa (****) a mińß ¶aan, …ô Ē~ °-*ussia dikuo d…ôbuŇčan nu sw…ôd…ôn mikuwan tu finr~…ĺand . na-puo-r~…ĺun nikaminan satu mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw , sakamusa ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat (****) a mińß ¶aan nu ¶i-…ô nika sasur~…ĺitan nika sasur~…ĺitan, d…ônmark ńßijan nu norwaj sipab…ôr~…ĺi i sw…ôd…ôn . apuju kuni kar~…ĺpa ¶aw amiwai…ôs, norwaj mar~…ĺa sw…ôd…ôn kuowan nikuwanan a wankuo. *****, . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku r~…ĺima (****) a mińß ¶aan, norwaj ńßan misadawmin tu wajwaj namaka sw…ôd…ôn mi ¶id…ôk masa ¶a ¶aj. *****, . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku war~…ĺu (****) a mińß ¶aan , i ¶…ôr~…ĺand miar~…ĺ…ôs tu d…ônmark mi ¶id…ôk masa ¶a ¶aj. fa-r~…ĺuo r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj a subar~…ĺ atu gr…ô…ônr~…ĺand katukuńß ajda u d…ônmark a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °.
S.FORM: Norway u Norway sa i labu nu Europe (O-Cuo ś≠źśī≤), itiza i 62 00 N, 10 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 323,802 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 304,282 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 19,520 km2. hamin nu tademawan sa 5,594,34 (2025). kakalukan umah sa 2.70%, kilakilangan umah sa 27.80%, zumaay henay umah sa 69.50%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Oslo . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 17 bulad 5 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (cong-tung, ÁłĹÁĶĪ) ayza sa ci Harald V, micakat a demiad sa i 1991 a mihca 1 bulad 17 demiad. cunli u cunli nu Norway ayza sa ci Jonas Gahr St√łre (Ap) (2021‚Äď), micakat a demiad sa i 2021 a mihcaan 10 bulad 14 demiad. likisi atu lalangawan nu Norway namakayda i amis nu Ze-Er-Man a tademaw kunyun pitu a lasubu siwa a bataan (790) a mihecaan malingatu misaahebal, katukuh i cacay a malebut enem a bataan idaw ku enem (1066) a mihecaan Denmark (Dan-May šłĻťļ•) a tademaw nu iluc madebung nuheni ku Ing-Ke-Lan , pangangan han tu "Wey-Cin-se-day" , u O-Cuo nanu mukasiay a zida' katukuh i nutebanay a se-ci nu milakuuytay a zitay. . Vikings (Wey-Cin a tademaw Á∂≠šļ¨šļļ) sasi nganganay a pacunaay tu balunga a tademaw, itda kuhuheni i De-Lan luyaluy a subal , Fa-Luo luyaluy a subal , Iceland (Pin-Daw ŚÜįŚ≥∂), Greenland (Ke-Lin-Lan ś†ľťôĶŤė≠), patideng kunuheni tu kakitidaan, itini i pulu' a bataan nu nikudan a secian cacay henay kasiwantan kueneng i Mey-Cuo Niw-Fen-Lan a siluma' sa. . unuheni han u micebisay nu kukung, palecad han kunipisiwbay, patideng kunuheni tu luma i Europe (O-Cuo ś≠źśī≤) nu lilis a dadipasan atu tepal nu sauwacan. idaw kuni pikilukan sakamusa i kunyun walu a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku siwa (839) a mihcaan namidebung henay ku nuheni tu Byzantinum hungtiay a kanatal (Pay-Can-Tin-Di'-Kuo śčúŚć†ŚĽ∑ŚłĚŚúč) micaliw tu hiday mamisawacu Africa . . nuheni a tademaw laklak sa i Europe (O-Cuo ś≠źśī≤), maala tu England a Denmark nu niyadu', Gi-Fu-Luo-Se , France a Nuo-Man-Di . katukuh tu Wey-Cin-Se-Day a hedek, Pey-O culal sa masacacay micidek patideng tu kanatal atu kuo-wan , milayap kunuheni tu kelistukiw , malingatu satu tu teban a se-ci . . katukuh tu Europe (O-Cuo ś≠źśī≤) namakay cuwacuwaay nu kanatal nika icelangan, tanengtu malalebu' tu ibayuay a lumuwataw Viking (Wey-Cin Á∂≠šļ¨) sa, Viking (Wey-Cin Á∂≠šļ¨) hamaw satu a malawpes. ÁīĄ820 . kiya walu a lasubu tusa a bataan (820) a mihcaan i nu Norway adidiay a kanatal nu liklik. sakaetiman nu wankuo u Si-Fu-Er , Huo-La-Cia-Lan , A-Er-Feo-Hay-Mu atu A-Ke-De-E , Ka-Er-Ma-Lian (Ść°Áąĺť¶¨ŤĀĮ, Kalmarunionen,cacay a malebut tulu a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku pitu ~ cacay a malebut lima a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku tulu (1397-1523) u sabaw tu sepat (14) a seci nu nikudan katukuh sabaw tu enem (16) a seci nu lingatu namaka Denmark , Sweden atu Norway misakaputay nu Se-Kan a Na-Wey-Ya kanatalay a lanmun . cacay a malebut tulu a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku pitu (1397) a mihcaan enem a bulad sabaw tu pitu a demiad, Denmark , Sweden atu Norway dayhuw itini i Sweden timulan a tukay Ka-Er-Ma mikaygi, pakasimata ku nuheni tu tuluay a wankuo mapulung kunuheni palekal tu Denmark nI-wang ci Ma-Ke-Li-Te' ise u kuo-wan atu secen a tademaw, u Norway atu Sweden kuowan u Denmark kuowan ku sikawaway . . Denmark wan-se mala nu tatuluay a kanatal mikuwanay.taya nu Sweden atu Norway hidantu ku wankuo caay bulici nuheni ku ngangan. . Denmark wanse pulungen nuheni ku tuluay a sakayputah a cabay atu nu hitay a kakawaw , sisa Sweden atu Norway hidantu ku wankuo caay bulici nuheni ku ngangan. . Denmark wanse pulungen nuheni ku tuluay a sakayputah a cabay atu nu hitay a kakawaw , nu kanatal tu akawaw u kanatal tu kumicidekay amasacacay. šĹÜśėĮ, . nika , inika pulunga tawya, Denmark kuowan caay kawni pikawaw tu Sweden secen atu kuowan, nu Sweden kuo-wan sakawaluay a Ka-Er mikuwan henay sa. . itini i salaadan sa, Sweden nu tateneng mikuwan sa numaka i nuudip tu a kanatal nu siilaya ani singkiwan nu secen tatapang śĒĚśĒŅŚģė. . tuluay a lanman hamin han ku Europe a kakitidaan pulung han tu cacay a wankuo amikuwan, pangalep tu Pa-o a niyaduan palung hantu cacaya a kuowan amikuwan, paka siida tu Pa-o a kanatal paculi tu De-I'-Ce-Han-Sa tungmum itida i Po-Luo-Di' a bayu atu amis a bayu anipisiwbaya putuna ku sakatayni. sabaw tu lima (15) a seci mahedek, Denmark wanse atu Sweden siidaay nai ku watan nikasasukapah, mihantaya a lanman sawsawni masasu ada kunuheni . . Ke-Li-S-Di-An e'se, i cacay a malebut lima a lasubu tusa a bataan (1520) a mihcaan ladayen nida ku hitay mialaw tu Sweden mihantaya nu mikuwanay a Sweden suodu S-De-Ke-E-Muo , sisa pipatayen nuheni ku katuuday nu palekalay tu kawaw a Sweden nusi idaay. 16 . sabaw tu enem a (16) a seci nu aayaw a Ka-Ma-Lenmum mililitay a tademaw cacay a malebut tulu a lasubu walu a bataan (1380) a mihcaan ci Ma-Ke-Li-Te' ise pabelien nida ku teluc, Po-Ma-La-Ni-Ia a pala Ay-Li-Ke'-Zn Norway kiowan. . u Norway han naw Di-Ke-Lin-Lan subal , Iceland atu Fa-luo luyaluy a subal namakayni malingatu u Denmark kumi kuwanay. . pulung nu lanmun sayaway, Ma-ke-li-te' ese a dawmi' nu wayway u Denmark wanse madiput nu pinaay a kanatal nu namuh, sisa nikudan satu Denmark wanse caay tu pisengal mikuwan tu Norway atu Sweden a labuay nu kawaw, nikahida sisa lanman miliyas tu nuhenian. 14Ťá≥16šłĖÁīÄ, . sabaw tu sepat (14) katukuh sabaw tu enem (16) a seci , Denmark maydih misungay tu Han-Sa' Tung-Mung milihida tu Puo-Luo-Di' a bayu a mikawaw pa'pun malihida malepacaw. . Denmark Aw-ten-paw wancaw a Ke'-Li-S-Di'-An ese'maala nida ku De-I-Ce a kitidaan Se-Le-Su-I-Ke atu He-E-Se-Tay-In a sapikuwan. 1521 . cacay a malebut lima a bataan tusa a lasubu idaw ku cacay (1521) a mihcaan Sweden siidaay ci Ku-S-Ta-Hu .Wa-Sa' itida i Da-La-Na-Sen milingatu palekal tu baluhay a Denmark nu hidayan. 1523ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut lima a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku tulu (1523) a mihcaan ci Ku-Se-Ta-Hu .Wa-Sa' itida i Han-Sa- Tunmum nipadangan sa midebung tu Se-De-Ke-E-Muo , Denmark ahitayan mademec, Sweden mapalekal misatada'. . mapatideng satu ku Sweden , Ka-E-Ma-Lanmum mabulesak tu kunuheni, nika u Denmark atu Norway mahidatu kunuheni masasukapah a kanatal. cacay a malebut lima a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku sepat (1534) a mihcaan Norway mapalawpes ku wankuo a ngangan, pahetiken mala Denmark a kenis. 17 . sabaw tu pitu (17) a seci, Sweden mangalay mialaw tu Po-Luo-Di' a bayu caay pisengal atu Denmark malepacaw. cacay a malebut enem a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku walu (1658) a mihcaan, Sweden sadikuday satu maalaw tu nuheni ku S-Kan-De-Na-Wia-ya a kumay s nu hatidaay tu nutenes ani a lawan nu Denmark a nutimulan nu dadipasan a kakitidaan. 1809ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut walu a lasubu idaw ku siwa (1809) a mihcaan, E'-Russia dikuo debungan nu Sweden mikuwan tu Finland . Na-Puo-Lun nikaminan satu malepacaw , sakamusa cacay a malebut walu a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku sepat (1814) a mihcaan nu Ci-E nika sasulitan nika sasulitan, Denmark hiyan nu Norway sipabeli i Sweden . apuyu kuni kalpacaw amiwaies, Norway mala Sweden kuowan nikuwanan a wankuo. 1905ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu idaw ku lima (1905) a mihcaan, Norway han misadawmin tu wayway namaka Sweden micidek masacacay. 1938ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku walu (1938) a mihcaan , Iceland miales tu Denmark micidek masacacay. Fa-Luo luyaluy a subal atu Greenland katukuh ayda u Denmark a lala'.

¶i , d…ônmark majdińß misuŇčaj tu ńßan-sa Ē~ ° tuŇč-muŇč mir~…ĺińßida tu puo-r~…ĺuo-di Ē~ ° a baju a mikawaw pa Ē~ °pun mar~…ĺińßida mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw. . d…ônmark aw-t…ôn-paw wan ¶aw a k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-s-di Ē~ °-an …ôs…ô Ē~ °maar~…ĺa nida ku d…ô-i- ¶…ô a kitidaan s…ô-r~…ĺ…ô-su-i-k…ô atu ńß…ô-…ô-s…ô-taj-in a sapikuwan. **** . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a bataan tusa a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku ¶a ¶aj (****) a mińß ¶aan sw…ôd…ôn siidaaj ¶i ku-s-ta-ńßu .wa-sa Ē~ ° itida i da-r~…ĺa-na-s…ôn mir~…ĺiŇčatu par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a d…ônmark nu ńßidajan. *****, . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu (****) a mińß ¶aan ¶i ku-s…ô-ta-ńßu .wa-sa Ē~ ° itida i ńßan-sa- tunmum nipadaŇčan sa mid…ôbuŇč tu s…ô-d…ô-k…ô-…ô-muo , d…ônmark ańßitajan mad…ôm…ô ¶, sw…ôd…ôn mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ misatada Ē~ °. . mapatid…ôŇč satu ku sw…ôd…ôn , ka-…ô-ma-r~…ĺanmum mabur~…ĺ…ôsak tu kunuńß…ôni, nika u d…ônmark atu norwaj mańßidatu kunuńß…ôni masasukapańß a kanatar~…ĺ. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat (****) a mińß ¶aan norwaj mapar~…ĺawp…ôs ku wankuo a ŇčaŇčan, pańß…ôtik…ôn mar~…ĺa d…ônmark a k…ônis. ** . sabaw tu pitu (**) a s…ô ¶i, sw…ôd…ôn maŇčar~…ĺaj miar~…ĺaw tu po-r~…ĺuo-di Ē~ ° a baju ¶aaj pis…ôŇčar~…ĺ atu d…ônmark mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut …ôn…ôm a r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku war~…ĺu (****) a mińß ¶aan, sw…ôd…ôn sadikudaj satu maar~…ĺaw tu nuńß…ôni ku s-kan-d…ô-na-wia-ja a kumaj s nu ńßatidaaj tu nut…ôn…ôs ani a r~…ĺawan nu d…ônmark a nutimur~…ĺan nu dadipasan a kakitidaan. *****, . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku siwa (****) a mińß ¶aan, …ô Ē~ °-*ussia dikuo d…ôbuŇčan nu sw…ôd…ôn mikuwan tu finr~…ĺand . na-puo-r~…ĺun nikaminan satu mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw , sakamusa ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat (****) a mińß ¶aan nu ¶i-…ô nika sasur~…ĺitan nika sasur~…ĺitan, d…ônmark ńßijan nu norwaj sipab…ôr~…ĺi i sw…ôd…ôn . apuju kuni kar~…ĺpa ¶aw amiwai…ôs, norwaj mar~…ĺa sw…ôd…ôn kuowan nikuwanan a wankuo. *****, . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku r~…ĺima (****) a mińß ¶aan, norwaj ńßan misadawmin tu wajwaj namaka sw…ôd…ôn mi ¶id…ôk masa ¶a ¶aj. *****, . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku war~…ĺu (****) a mińß ¶aan , i ¶…ôr~…ĺand miar~…ĺ…ôs tu d…ônmark mi ¶id…ôk masa ¶a ¶aj. fa-r~…ĺuo r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj a subar~…ĺ atu gr…ô…ônr~…ĺand katukuńß ajda u d…ônmark a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °.
